## Genestealer Cults

![][image1]

### Genestealer Cults Special Rules

**Cult Ambush.** At the start of the battle, before deployment, choose up to half of your GENESTEALER CULTS models, rounded up, to be waiting to Ambush. Those models gain DEEP STRIKE, but are deployed with this Keyword in a special way.

After normal deployment, place four 32mm Cult Ambush markers on the battlefield, each at least 8” away from any enemy model, and not within line of sight of any enemy. Your models in waiting to Ambush can be deployed using their DEEP STRIKE keyword only within 3” of one of your Cult Ambush markers, and more then 1” away from all enemies, instead of the normal restrictions, and are not adjusted by D3”.

**Infiltration.** During a campaign, when you create your Warband, or when you gain control of an Institution, choose one of the following Institutions to be your target or roll randomly. You cannot choose an Institution that you already Control.

1. **Community**  
   * **Conditions:** Gain an Infiltration Point if fewer than half of your models, rounded down, were taken Out of Action.  
   * **Reward:** Permanently increase your Model Limit for each battle by 2\.  
2. **Industry**  
   * **Conditions:** Gain an Infiltration Point if you won the battle, or scored at least ⅔ of the number of VP as your opponent.  
   * **Reward:** Your credit limit is permanently increased by 50, and you earn 100 credits.  
3. **Military**  
   * **Conditions:** Gain an Infiltration Point if you took at least half of the enemy models, rounded up, Out of Action.  
   * **Reward:** Each of your Elite models earns an additional 1 XP.  
4. **Politics**  
   * **Conditions:** Gain an Infiltration Point if one of your Elite models scored a Glorious Deed.  
   * **Reward:** Your Warband leader can choose to gain a Patron Skill the next time it has enough XP to learn a Campaign Skill, instead of rolling.  
5. **Religion**  
   * **Conditions:** Gain an Infiltration Point if you succeeded on a Morale test, and/or if your opponent failed one.  
   * **Reward:** You earn 2 Glory.  
6. **Resources**  
   * **Conditions:** At the start of the battle, your opponent places a 1” Resource marker on the battlefield, at least 6” closer to your deployment zone than their own. At the end of the battle, if your opponent has more models within 3” of the Resource marker than you, they earn 50 credits. If you have more models than your opponent within 3” of the Resource marker at the end of the battle, you gain an Infiltration Point.  
   * **Reward:** During this or any future quartermaster step, you can purchase up to two total pieces of battlekit from your Campaign Shop.

Keep track of your Infiltration Points, beginning at 0\. At the end of each battle, you gain 1 Infiltration Point if you satisfied the conditions listed for your target Institution.

Once you have 3 Infiltration Points, you gain Control of your target Institution and permanently gain that Institution’s Reward, then reset your Infiltration Points to 0 and choose a new target Institution. If you have fewer than 3 Infiltration Points, you can choose to abandon your current Institution target and choose another, but your Infiltration Points reset to 0 if you do.

### Genestealer Cults Patrons

Your patron must be The Four-Armed Emperor.

#### Patron: The Four-Armed Emperor

* **Alien Majesty.** This model gains FEAR.  
* **Biomorph Adaptation.** This model has \+1 INJURY DICE with melee attacks.  
* **Born Survivor.** Injury rolls made against this model as a result of melee attacks are made at \-1 DICE.  
* **Focus of Adoration.** When this model is hit, it can choose one non-Elite ally within 3” of it. That model becomes the target of the hit instead, even if it would normally be out of range.  
* **Preturnatural Speed.** When an enemy Charges this model, if this model has not Activated this Turn, it can immediately take the Fight Action against that enemy before it takes any further actions. This can be done only once per Turn, and this model counts as having already taken the Fight Action during its Activation this Turn.  
* **Shadow Stalker.** Attacks made against this model have \-1 DICE to Hit.

### Genestealer Cults Unique Battlekit

#### Genestealer Cults Special Melee Weapons

* **Bonesword.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL  
* **Lash Whip.** Melee, BLOCK, WHIP 3”  
* **Toxin Injector Claw.** Melee, CRITICAL, GAS, MAIN HAND ONLY

#### Genestealer Cults Equipment

* **Atalan Bike.** The equipped model is mounted on a bike. The rider gains the LARGE Keyword if it is not already LARGE, as well as the VEHICLE Keyword, a movement speed of 10”/Infantry, but has only one hand to carry other weapons, though it can hold two-handed weapons with Shield Combo. It also has the Demolition Run and Outrider abilities. If it is selected for your Cult Ambush special rule, it must also be placed within 8” of a table edge.  
  * **Demolition Run.** The rider can ignore the HEAVY Keyword of Blasting Charges.  
  * **Outrider.** The rider has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls, but it cannot climb sheer surfaces.  
* **Atalan Quad.** The equipped model is mounted on a quad bike. The rider gains the LARGE Keyword if it is not already LARGE, as well as the VEHICLE Keyword, a movement speed of 10”/Infantry, and an additional \-1 INJURY MODIFIER (does not stack with a shield), but it has only one hand to carry other weapons, though it can hold two-handed weapons with Shield Combo. It also has the Built-In Weapon and Turbo-Boost abilities. It cannot be chosen for your Cult Ambush special rule.  
  * **Built-In Weapon.** The rider can be equipped with up to 1 additional non-Grenade ranged weapon, which does not take any hands. The rider ignores the HEAVY Keyword of this weapon, and it can be used alongside any other ranged weapon when the rider takes the Shoot Action.  
  * **Turbo Boost.** The rider has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls, but it cannot climb sheer surfaces.

### Genestealer Cults Campaign Shop

During a campaign, these pieces of battlekit are available only when your Warband is specifically allowed to purchase them.

* **Amulet Of The Voidwyrm (5 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** Once per battle, before making an Injury roll, you can cause that roll to automatically be a Minor Hit. This choice is made before your opponent spends any BLOOD MARKERS.  
* **Crouchling (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** Whenever the owner makes a PSYCHIC attack or takes a PSYCHIC Success Roll, it can add \+1 DICE to that roll. Cannot be combined with a Psychic Familiar.  
* **Crown of Ascendancy (6 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Patriarch Only).** The first psychic power the Patriarch uses during each of its Activations does not count towards the Using Multiple Powers rules. In addition, while this model is not Out of Action, you have an additional \+1 DICE to Morale tests.  
* **Dagger Of Swift Sacrifice (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Primus Only).** Melee, \+2 INJURY MODIFIER  
* **Elixir of Dark Vistas (1 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Leader Only, CONSUMABLE).** The equipped model earns an additional 2 XP at the end of the battle.  
* **Gift From Beyond (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** 48”, \+1 DICE, \+1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL, RISKY, Scope. Enemy models cannot change the target of this attack.  
* **Oppressor’s Bane (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Brood Brothers Only).** 15”, \+1 INJURY DICE against a target with a Crossfire token, ASSAULT, PISTOL, Scope  
* **Pennant of Ascension (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1, model with Cult Icon Only).** Friendly models within 6” of the bearer have \+1 DICE to Hit with all attacks.  
* **Pervasion Veil (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, non-Patriarch, non-Vehicle Only).** The equipped model gains a movement speed of 8” and FLYING.  
* **Stratodais (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Nexos Only).** The bearer has \+1 DICE and can move up to two Cult Ambush markers when using its Cult infiltration Ability.  
* **Unwilling Orb (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Psyker Only).** The bearer can Deny The WItch an additional time during each Turn. The first time it Denies The Witch does not count towards the number of powers the bearer has used for the purposes of Using Multiple Powers that Turn.  
* **Voice Of The Liberator (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Clamavus Only).** Increase the range of the bearer’s Voice of New Truths Ability by 4”.

### Broodmind Psychic Discipline

* **Mass Hypnosis (3 Glory, Effect).** 6”, Each Enemy, each target must immediately move D3” in the direction of your choice. Each can move in a different direction. This movement can bring the target into or out of melee, and counts as a Charge and/or Retreat as appropriate.  
* **Mental Onslaught (7 credits, Attack).** 12”, IGNORE ARMOUR, PSYCHIC, RISKY, STUN  
* **Might From Beyond (5 credits, Effect).** \-1 DICE, 12”, Self or One Ally, Target Activation, the target has \+1 DICE to Hit and \+1 INJURY DICE with all melee attacks.  
* **Mind Control (10 credits, Effect).** 12”, One Enemy, Immediate, the target must move D6” in the direction of your choice. This movement can bring the target into or out of melee, and counts as a Charge and/or Retreat as appropriate.  
* **Psionic Blast (5 credits, Attack).** 12”, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, BLAST 3”, STUN, PSYCHIC, RISKY  
* **Psychic Stimulus (5 credits, Effect).** 12”, One Ally, Immediate, the target can take a Standard Move or Retreat Action.

### Genestealer Cults Elites

#### 1 Primus (Cost: 55 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Primus | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Primus can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Genestealer Cults Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Decoys and Misdirection.** At the start of each battle, after deployment, you can remove up to three of your models from the table, then deploy three models from among those you just removed and the models you selected for Cult Ambush. Any models you deploy in this way are no longer selected for Cult Ambush if they were, and any models you don’t deploy are now selected for Cult Ambush if they were not.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, GENESTEALER CULTS, LEADER, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Clamavus (Cost: 65 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Clamavus | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Clamavus can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Genestealer Cults Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Scrambler Array.** Enemy models must be set up at least 16” away from the Clamavus when using the DEEP STRIKE or INFILTRATOR Keywords.  
* **Voice of New Truths.** Enemy models within 8” of the Clamavus have \-1 DICE to all actions.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, FEAR, GENESTEALER CULTS

#### 0-1 Magus (Cost: 40 Credits \+cost of weapon and powers)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Magus | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+0 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Magus can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Genestealer Cults Armoury. It must be equipped with exactly one PSYCHIC Weapon.

The Magus may purchase up to three powers from the Broodmind Discipline, and must purchase at least one.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, GENESTEALER CULTS, PSYKER 1

#### 0-1 Nexos (Cost: 50 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Nexos | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Nexos can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Genestealer Cults Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Cult Infiltration.** As an Action with a Success Roll, the Nexos can choose one Cult Ambush marker it can see within 24” of it. On a success, you can move that marker up to 6” in any direction, ignoring terrain.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, GENESTEALER CULTS, STEALTH

### Genestealer Cults Troops

#### Neophyte (Cost: 30 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Neophyte | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+0 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Neophyte can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Genestealer Cults Armoury.

**Upgrades**

* **Neophyte Miner.** Up to 2 Neophytes can be upgraded to Neophyte Miners at a cost of \+5 credits each, allowing them to ignore the HEAVY Keyword of a single weapon they carry.

**Keywords**  
GENESTEALER CULTS

#### 0-6 Acolyte (Cost: 50 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Acolyte | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Acolyte can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Genestealer Cults Armoury.

**Upgrades**  
An Acolyte can have only one of the following upgrades.

* **Metamorph.** Up to half of your Acolytes, rounded down, can be upgraded to Metamorphs for \+15 credits each, granting them the Metamorph Talon weapon:  
  * **Metamorph Talon.** Melee, CLEAVE 2, HELD  
* **Acolyte Miner.** Up to 2 Acolytes can be upgraded to Acolyte Miners at a cost of \+10 credits each, granting them the STRONG Keyword.

**Keywords**  
GENESTEALER CULTS, SKIRMISHER, STEALTH

#### 0-3 Aberrant (Cost: 50 Credits \+10 for hammer)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Aberrant | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+2 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Aberrant must be equipped with a Two-Handed Hammer, included in its price. It cannot be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment.

**Abilities**

* **Aberrant Biology.** All Injuries rolled against the Aberrant are made at \-1 DICE.  
* **Hulking Bodyguard.** If any ally within 1” of the Aberrant is hit by a ranged or melee weapon (excluding BLAST weapons), you can choose to redirect the hit to the Aberrant instead. Determine the injuries exactly as if the weapon just hit the Aberrant.

**Keywords**  
GENESTEALER CULTS, LIMITED POTENTIAL, STRONG

#### 0-1 Abominant (Cost: 95 Credits \+20 for thunder hammer)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Abominant | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+3 | 0 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Abominant is equipped with a Thunder Hammer, included in its price. It cannot be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment.

**Abilities**

* **The Chosen One.** All Injuries rolled against the Abominant are made at \-2 DICE.  
* **Heavy Swing.** The Abominant targets each enemy within 1” when it makes a melee attack.

**Keywords**  
GENESTEALER CULTS, LARGE, NEGATE FEAR, NO PROMOTION, REGENERATE 1, STRONG, TOUGH

### Genestealer Cults Mercenaries

You can recruit the following mercenaries:

* 0-3 Genestealer (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Benefictus (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Biophagus (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Kelermorph (Cost: 4 Glory)  
* 0-1 Lictor (Cost: 5 Glory) Final Day only  
* 0-1 Locus (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Reductus Saboteur (Cost: 3 Glory)   
* 0-1 Sanctus Sniper (Cost: 4 Glory)   
* 0-1 Sanctus Talon (Cost: 3 Glory)   
* 0-1 Von Ryan’s Leaper (Cost: 4 Glory) Final Day only

### Warband Variant: Brood Brothers

* **Military Infiltration.** You can recruit up to 1 Commissar, 6 Guardsmen, 3 Veteran Guardsmen (no Drop Troopers), and 2 Heavy Weapons Teams from the Astra Militarum Faction. Up to 1 of those Veteran Guardsmen can be a Lieutenant, gaining the ELITE Keyword.  
* **Military Cult.** You cannot recruit a Clamavus or a Nexos.  
* **Military Strategy.** You gain the Voice of Command rule from the Astra Militarum Faction. Note that only MILITARUM models can give or receive Orders, and only GENESTEALER CULT models can benefit from your Cult Ambush rule.  
* **Crossfire.** Whenever one of your MILITARUM models makes a ranged attack against an enemy model, give that enemy a Crossfire token. When one of your GENESTEALER CULTS models makes a ranged attack against an enemy with a Crossfire token, that attack has \+1 DICE to Hit. A model can have only one Crossfire token, and all Crossfire tokens are removed at the end of the Turn.

### Warband Variant: Broodcoven

* **Rule of the Patriarch.** You cannot take a Primus or a Magus, and instead must take a Patriarch, described below, as your Warband leader.  
* **Purestrain.** You can recruit up to 3 Genestealers as normal Troops in your Warband for 75 credits each.

#### 1 Patriarch (Cost: 160 Credits \+ cost of powers)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Patriarch | 8”/Infantry | N/A | \+3 | \-2 | 50mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Patriarch is equipped with two Patriarch Claws and heavy carapace, included in its cost and statistics above. It IGNORE OFF-HAND when fighting with its claws. It can be equipped with any equipment from the Genestealer Cults Armoury besides Headgear, a Medicae Kit, a Grapnel Launcher, or any equipment that takes up any hands.

* **Patriarch Claws.** Melee, VICIOUS 10, \+1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL

The Patriarch may purchase up to five powers from the Broodmind Discipline and/or the Tyranids Psychic Powers list, and must purchase at least two.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, FEAR, GENESTEALER CULTS, LARGE, LEADER, PSYKER 2, STRONG, TOUGH

### Warband Variant: The Final Day

* **Arrival of the Star Children.** You can recruit up to 5 Gaunts (no Neurogaunts, maximum 1 Barbgaunt), 2 Tyranid Warriors, 2 Raveners (no Ravener Prime), and 1 Zoanthrope from the Tyranids Faction. Your patron can be The Hive Mind from the Tyranids Faction.  
* **Hive Mind Expansion.** You gain the Synapse rule from the Tyranids Faction. This and any other rule that applies to your GENESTEALER CULT models as well as your TYRANID models.  
* **Psychic Parasitism.** Each TYRANID model in your Warband can, by succeeding on a Success Roll, sap the life force out of a friendly non-TYRANID GENESTEALER CULTS model within 6” of it. On a success, you can move 1 BLOOD MARKER from the TYRANID model to the GENESTEALER CULTS model.  
* **No More Hiding.** You do not have the Cult Ambush rule.  
* **Converted to Biomass.** You can recruit only up to 3 Acolytes and 2 Aberrants.  
* **Out With the Old.** You can purchase only up to 1 of each of Mining Lasers, Seismic Cannons, Heavy Rock Drills, Heavy Rock Saws, and Blasting Charges.
